segments.text: If I have learned anything in my time traveling the world, it is the power of hope, the power
of one person, a Washington, a Lincoln, King Mandela, and even a young girl from Pakistan,
One person can change the world by giving people hope.
Start each day with a task completed.
Find someone to help you through life, respect everyone.
Know that life is not fair and that you will fail often.
But if you take some risks, step up when the times are the toughest.
Face down the bullies, lift up the downtrodden and never ever give up.
If you do these things, the next generation and the generations that follow will live
in a world far better than the one we have today.
And what started here will indeed have changed the world for the better.
Finally in Seal Training there is a bell.
